basis: Static audit for agent event parsing and frontend conversation state mapping. Runtime visual/state behavior remains covered by dynamic, disclosure, file-diff, virtual-scroll, collapse, live-anchor, and final-screenshot audits.

checks.name: agent maps user_message
agent maps agent_message to assistant_message
agent maps task_started to transient turn_started
agent maps task_complete to transient turn_completed
agent maps reasoning summary to summary event
agent maps live function/tool_call as running tool_call
checks.details: case "function_call"(?:,\s*"tool_call")?: ... if includeTransient ... data\["status"\] = "running" ... else ... data\["status"\] = "completed" ... newParsedEvent\("tool_call"

checks.name: agent maps function/tool_call_output to completed tool_output
agent preserves call/output/status/exit metadata
agent parses JSON arguments into args
manager emits user prompts
manager emits turn_cancelled status
manager streams stdout for the active turn
manager streams stderr for the active turn
manager emits turn_started from CLI events for the active turn
manager emits turn_completed from CLI events atomically
frontend activity kinds include running/control surface
frontend terminal statuses include success failure cancel states
frontend settling hides stale pending activity
frontend keeps resolved tool_call visible after output
frontend starts new visual turn on user_message
processed summary label is separated from reasoning detail text
process summary can be generated from process events
assistant commentary merges into final answer after process summary
completed turn stream only keeps non-collapsible events after final answer
checks.details: const afterFinal = contentEntries ... entry\.index > finalEntry\.index && !isCollapsibleProcessSignal\(entry\.event\) ... const streamFollowups = buildStreamFollowups\(afterFinal\)

checks.name: cancelled terminal activity stays out of process summaries
tool outputs bind to tool calls by call id
checks.details: callsByID\.set\(callID, item\) ... const target = callID \? callsByID\.get\(callID\)

checks.name: orphan stdout stderr output hidden from stream rows
exec_command grouping is disabled for official alignment
renderer uses official-style tool disclosure
renderer renders running shell tool calls
renderer exposes exit code footer
dynamic audit covers running completed failed cancelled composer states
checks.details: running shell command block present ... completed transition command is hidden for official alignment ... failed shell command remains visible ... cancelled turn status row present ... composer typed text is visible text

checks.name: final screenshot capture covers required visual states
